name: ValveResourceFormat
description: MCP server for interacting with Valve Source 2 resource formats. Requires VRF_CLI_PATH environment variable pointing to Source2Viewer-CLI.exe.

tools.name: inspect_file
tools.description: Inspect a Source 2 resource file and return detailed information about its structure, blocks, and data. Use format 'vpk_path::internal_path' to inspect files inside a VPK archive.

file_path.description: Path to the resource file. Can be a filesystem path OR format 'vpk_path::internal_path' for files inside a VPK (e.g., 'C:\game\pak01_dir.vpk::models/player.mdl')

tools.name: list_vpk_contents
tools.description: List all files in a VPK (Valve Package) archive, with optional filtering by extension or path.

extension_filter.description: Comma-separated list of extensions to filter (e.g., 'vmdl,vmat')

tools.name: decompile_resource
tools.description: Decompile a Source 2 resource file to its raw, human-readable format.

input_path.description: Path to the resource file to decompile

output_path.description: Optional output path for the decompiled file

tools.name: export_gltf
tools.description: Export a 3D model (.vmdl) to glTF/glb format for viewing in other tools.

output_path.description: Path for the output glTF/glb file

include_animations.description: Whether to include animations in the export

include_materials.description: Whether to include materials in the export

tools.name: extract_texture
tools.description: Extract a texture (.vtex) to an image file (PNG/TGA).

output_path.description: Path for the output image file

tools.name: get_file_info
tools.description: Get basic information about a file (size, type, extension).

tools.name: list_directory_resources
tools.description: List all Source 2 resource files in a directory, with optional filtering.

directory.description: Path to the directory to scan

extension_filter.description: Comma-separated list of extensions to include

tools.name: verify_vpk
tools.description: Verify the integrity and signatures of a VPK archive.

tools.name: decompile_vpk
tools.description: Decompile all resources in a VPK archive to a specified output directory.

extension_filter.description: Comma-separated list of extensions to filter

recursive.description: Whether to recurse into nested VPKs

tools.name: collect_stats
tools.description: Collect statistics about resource files. Use 'steam' as input to scan all Steam libraries.

input_path.description: Path to file/folder/VPK, or 'steam' for all Steam libraries

include_files.description: Print example file names for each stat

particles.description: Collect particle operators, renderers, emitters, initializers

tools.name: export_gltf_advanced
tools.description: Export a 3D model to glTF format with advanced options including animation/mesh filtering and VPK support.

model_path.description: Path to the model file (.vmdl) or internal path for VPK

output_path.description: Path for the output glTF/glb file

vpk_path.description: VPK path if model_path is internal path

animation_list.description: Comma-separated animation names to include (default all)

mesh_list.description: Comma-separated mesh names to include (default all)

textures_adapt.description: Perform glTF spec adaptations on textures

export_extras.description: Export additional mesh properties into glTF extras
